dart_path.label: dart CLI path
dart_path.description: Absolute path to the dart CLI (sai venv).

nu_path.label: nushell for slimming
nu_path.description: nu used to slim dart's JSON output before parsing.

limit.label: Max runs listed
limit.description: Upper bound passed to dart run filter --limit.

poll_seconds.label: Poll interval (s)
poll_seconds.description: Background refresh cadence for the run list.
